name: fable-ontology-agent
description: Agent plugin for auditing, querying, scoring, and operationalizing the verified Fable ontology.

interface.shortDescription: Audit and apply the verified Fable ontology.
interface.longDescription: A local agent plugin that turns the verified Fable ontology into usable tools for grounding audits, atom search, node inspection, workflow scoring, and prompt-pack generation. It does not make a Fable identity claim; it works only from bundled ontology evidence and explicitly marked interpretive items.
defaultPrompt: Audit this session against the Fable ontology.
Find ontology nodes about validation loops.
Build a strict prompt pack from the ontology.
